en_body:
The blades of grass and the blossoms
of dandelions and clovers
will writhe and complain
when you lay me down upon the grass.
Flowers and leaves gently receive the evening dew,
The mountain beyond stands solemn.
And the oak branches high above
often let fall little green seeds
embraced by brown caps patterned in veins
...suddenly...
...They may very well fall upon
your back, and utter a
small yet piercing cry,
And my fingernails pressing upon
the back of your shirt
will too...

Afternoon Upon The Grassy Hill
The blades of grass and the blossoms
of dandelions and clovers
will writhe and complain
when you lay me down upon the grass.
Flowers and leaves gently receive the evening dew,
The mountain beyond stands solemn.
And the oak branches high above
often let fall little green seeds
embraced by brown caps patterned in veins
...suddenly...
...They may very well fall upon
your back, and utter a
small yet piercing cry,
And my fingernails pressing upon
the back of your shirt
will too...
